data.body: When ticket comment and ticket transition are chained in a single Bash tool call (e.g., via && or ;), the combined execution time can exceed the ~73s tool timeout ceiling, producing exit 144. The ticket comment succeeds but the transition is silently dropped. The ticket remains in its previous status with no error surfaced to the caller. Observed during /dso:end-session when closing bug b9a9-4cb3 — the comment was written but the close was lost.
